2026-04-24.content:
The Database Center REST and RPC APIs are available in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).
The Database Center API provides access to an organization-wide,
cross-product database fleet health platform. You can use the API to aggregate
health, security, and compliance signals from various Google Cloud
databases.

For more information, see the [Database Center API reference](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/reference).

summary.title: Database Center API now in Preview
summary.summary: The Database Center API, a new platform for monitoring the health, security, and compliance of your entire database fleet, is now available in preview. This API aggregates signals from various Google Cloud databases, offering an organization-wide view. Explore the API reference for more details.

2026-04-24.content:
Database Center support for Model Context Protocol (MCP) is
[generally available](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages)
(GA). You can use the Database Center remote MCP server to
connect to Database Center from AI applications such as
Gemini CLI, ChatGPT, or Claude. The MCP server provides access to
Database Center tools that help you review fleet health, audit
inventory, and check for security issues.

For more information, see [Use the Database Center remote MCP server](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/use-database-center-mcp) and the
[Database Center MCP tools reference](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/reference/mcp).

summary.title: Database Center MCP Support Now Generally Available
summary.summary: Database Center now fully supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing AI applications like Gemini CLI, ChatGPT, and Claude to connect. This enables easier access to tools for reviewing fleet health, auditing inventory, and checking security.

2026-04-24.content:
Database Center fleet insights are available in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).
Fleet insights highlight inventory and performance insights
generated by Gemini. You can use these insights to identify and
understand specific issues in your database fleet.

For more information, see [View the performance of your database fleet](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/performance#fleet-performance-insights) and [View your fleet inventory](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/view-inventory#fleet-inventory-insights).

summary.title: Fleet insights now in preview
summary.summary: Database Center fleet insights are now available in preview. These insights, powered by Gemini, help you understand inventory and performance across your database fleet, enabling you to identify and address specific issues.

2026-04-24.content:
Database Center dashboard reporting is available in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).
You can configure daily, weekly, and monthly reports that summarize your fleet
inventory and health.

For more information, see [Create reports for your dashboard views](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/report).

summary.title: New Database Reporting Available
summary.summary: The Database Center now offers a new dashboard reporting feature in Preview. You can configure daily, weekly, and monthly reports to summarize your fleet's inventory and health. This allows for better tracking and management of your database resources.

2026-04-24.content:
Database Center can monitor BigQuery resources. The resources
table shows the following for a BigQuery database:

* Datasets for a BigQuery database. For more
  information, see [Introduction to datasets](https://docs.cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/datasets-intro).
* The number of reservations, which reserve resources, to process
  queries.

This feature is in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Monitor BigQuery Resources
summary.summary: Database Center now monitors BigQuery resources, including datasets and query reservations. This new feature is currently in Preview, offering enhanced visibility into your BigQuery usage.

2026-04-24.content:
Database Center lets you monitor active queries across your
fleet to identify and analyze query issues, such as slow queries. This feature
supports AlloyDB for PostgreSQL and Cloud SQL database products.

For more information, see [View the performance of your database fleet](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/performance).

summary.title: Monitor active queries across your database fleet
summary.summary: Database Center now allows you to monitor active queries across your entire database fleet, helping you identify and analyze issues like slow queries. This new feature supports both AlloyDB for PostgreSQL and Cloud SQL. Gain deeper insights into your database performance and optimize query execution.

2026-04-24.content:
Monitoring the inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle Database@Google Cloud
databases using Database Center is
[generally available](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages)
(GA). For more information, see
[Supported health issues](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/database-health-issues#supported-health-issues).

summary.title: Database Center now generally available
summary.summary: Monitor your Oracle Database@Google Cloud inventory, metrics, and alerts with Database Center. This feature is now generally available, offering enhanced visibility and management capabilities for your databases.

2025-12-22.content:
You can use Database Center to monitor your Cloud SQL database
resources for enhanced backup protection. Enhanced protection is a
Backup and DR Service feature. For more information, see
[Use enhanced backup protection](https://docs.cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/best-practices-managing-database-fleet-health#enhanced-backup).
To configure enhanced backups for Cloud SQL resources, see
[Enhanced backups](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sql/docs/postgres/backup-recovery/backups).

summary.title: Database Center: Enhanced Backup Protection for Cloud SQL
summary.summary: Monitor your Cloud SQL databases with Database Center for enhanced backup protection. This feature, part of the Backup and DR Service, ensures greater data safety. Configure these enhanced backups for your Cloud SQL resources to improve your recovery capabilities.

2025-10-10.content:
You can monitor the inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle Database@Google Cloud
databases using Database Center. For more information, see
[Metrics and alerting policy filters](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/metrics).
Oracle Database@Google Cloud support in Database Center is in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products/#product-launch-stages).
During Preview, you can't monitor health issues for Oracle Database@Google Cloud
databases.

summary.title: Oracle Database@Google Cloud monitoring in Database Center
summary.summary: Monitor inventory, metrics, and alerts for Oracle databases using Database Center. This feature is currently in Preview, with health issue monitoring not yet available.

2025-09-02.content:
You can create alerting policies for new database resources and signals, using
filters to restrict the monitored metric data. This feature lets you get
detailed insights into the health of your database fleet and troubleshoot
issues. You can filter data based on metric labels, such as signal type, or by
resource labels, such as the resource's location or name. For more information,
see
[Metrics and alerting policy filters](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/metrics).

summary.title: Database Alerting Policies
summary.summary: Create alerting policies for new database resources and signals with filters to restrict monitored metric data, gaining detailed insights into your database fleet's health and troubleshooting issues by filtering data based on metric or resource labels.

2025-09-02.content:
The following performance recommendations and insights are available in
Database Center:

* Replication lag for Bigtable.
* Outdated client for Bigtable.
* Connections burdening disk for Cloud SQL for SQL Server.
* Location org policy not satisfied for Spanner.

For more information, see
[Supported health issues](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/database-health-issues#health-issue-categories).

summary.title: Database performance insights now available in Database Center
summary.summary: Database Center now provides performance insights for Bigtable replication lag and outdated clients, as well as Cloud SQL for SQL Server connection issues and Spanner location policy violations.

2025-08-05.content:
Database Center offers monitoring support for databases running on
Google Compute Engine virtual machines. This feature is in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).
To request access to this feature, visit the
[access request page](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc_6uR6JTpgdtJ-oqQbW8gprcypGQoFcR-CUgydYeBZNtvcaw/viewform).
For more information, see
[Monitor databases on Compute Engine virtual machines](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/monitor-gce-databases).

summary.title: New Monitoring Support for GCE Databases
summary.summary: Monitoring for databases on Compute Engine virtual machines is now available in preview.

2025-08-05.content:
Database Center supports the analyze system performance feature
in the *High Resource Utilization* recommendation for
AlloyDB for PostgreSQL. For more information, see
[Performance insights and recommendations](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/learn-database-products-using-gemini#performance_insights_and_recommendations).

summary.title: New Feature: AlloyDB Performance Analysis
summary.summary: Analyze system performance for AlloyDB now available.

2025-08-05.content:
You can monitor the number of new Google Cloud database resources that were
added to your fleet over the past 1, 7, or 30 days. For more information, see
[View recently added database resources](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/monitor-gce-databases#view-recently-added-database-resources).

summary.title: Monitoring new database resources
summary.summary: Monitor new database resources added to your fleet over the past 1, 7, or 30 days.

2025-08-05.content:
You can enable Gemini chat at the folder level to help you learn about
Google Cloud database products. To learn how to enable Gemini
chat at the folder level, see
[Before you begin using Gemini chat](https://cloud.google.com/database-center/docs/learn-database-products-using-gemini#before-you-begin).

summary.title: Gemini Chat Available at Folder Level
summary.summary: Gemini chat is now available at the folder level.
